creator: rezny@freebsd.org
text: I have the same problem and I also have set CPUTYPE in make.conf. That did not pose a problem with the prior version of the port, so I first suspected a change in the port iteself (many patches were dropped). Notice that the upstream bug "reported a long time ago" is reported against the version which was just put in ports, 4.02.1, so maybe the problem was first introduced upstream at this version. Anyway, there is no point in re-opening the upstream bug unless the patch doesn't work. I have tested the patch from upstream, same as sunpoet attached. It fixes the build for me.
